summary_en: Deep Blue Case Workshop — reference case studies and project templates

items.name: Dashboard Analytics Platform
items.summary: Apache Superset 企业级数据探索与可视化平台，是构建复杂交互式仪表盘的大师级参考案例，覆盖 React + TypeScript + D3.js 全栈技术方案。
items.summary_en: Enterprise-grade data exploration and visualization platform with interactive dashboards at scale. React + TypeScript + D3.js reference architecture.

items.name: Ecommerce Platform
items.summary: Medusa.js 开源无头电商平台，Next.js 官方店面的完整生产级电商参考实现，包含商品展示、购物车、结账流程和 Stripe 支付集成。
items.summary_en: Open-source headless commerce platform with Next.js storefront — product pages, cart, checkout, and Stripe payments integration.

items.name: Form Builder Tool
items.summary: 阿里巴巴 Formily 复杂场景表单解决方案，拖拽式表单构建器与 JSON Schema 驱动的表单渲染引擎，低代码 UI 构建器的理想参考。
items.summary_en: Drag-and-drop form builder with JSON Schema output — ideal reference for low-code UI builders and dynamic form rendering engines.

items.name: React Vite Admin
items.summary: 基于 React + Vite + Ant Design 的生产级企业后台管理模板，内置认证鉴权、RBAC 权限系统和国际化方案，开箱即用。
items.summary_en: Production-ready enterprise admin dashboard scaffold with React, Vite, Ant Design, auth, RBAC, and i18n built-in.

items.name: UniApp Mini Tool
items.summary: 跨平台 UniApp 脚手架，搭载 uView UI 组件库，一套代码同时发布到微信小程序、H5、iOS 和 Android 多端平台。
items.summary_en: Cross-platform UniApp scaffold — build once, deploy to WeChat mini-programs, H5, iOS, and Android with uView UI components.

items.name: Vue3 H5 Mall
items.summary: 基于 Vue 3 + Vite + Vant UI 的完整 H5 移动端商城模板，包含商品列表、购物车、结算和用户中心等核心电商模块。
items.summary_en: Complete H5 mobile mall with Vue 3, Vite, and Vant UI — product listing, cart, checkout, and user center modules.
